heading: Report on bridge displacement detection systems
label: 20145 Report on bridge displacement detection systems
text: Not later than 18 months after , the Secretary of Transportation shall transmit to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate and the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives a report concerning any action that has been taken by the Secretary on railroad bridge displacement detection systems.November 2, 1994
notes: Amendments1996— substituted “” for “the date of enactment of the Federal Railroad Safety Authorization Act of 1994” and “Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure” for “Committee on Energy and Commerce”.Pub. L. 104–287November 2, 1994
